subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historical fort is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर में किस अभिज्ञानी किलेंग हैं ?
explanation_en:
Hawa Mahal is a famous historical monument located in Jaipur. It is known for its unique architecture and serves as a popular tourist attraction.

हवा महाल, Jaipur में बैठी अभिज्ञानी मंदिर है। इसमें अपने अपने अभिज्ञानी मंदिर है।
explanation_hi: हवा महाल, Jaipur में बैठी अभिज्ञानी मंदिर है। इसमें अपने अभिज्ञानी मंदिर है।
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous architectural marvel located in Jaipur. It was constructed by Maharaja Sawai Mansingh II in the 18th century as a royal palace.
explanation_hi: हवा महाल, Jaipur में बैठी अभिज्ञानी मंदिर है। महाल सौवान मस्तिन दौर बनि 18वेंद्र के कागद मंदिर है।
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous architectural marvel located in Jaipur. It was constructed by Maharaja Sawai Mansingh II in the 18th century as a royal palace.
